sutta: monks i will teach the 9 conditions rooted in craving listen be heed i will speak and what are the 9 conditions rooted in craving seeking comes into being because of craving acquisition because of seeking decision making because of acquisition lustful desire because of decision making attachment because of lustful desire appropriation because of attachment average because of appropriation guarding because of everest and many a bad and wicked state of things arises from the act of guarding the taking up of stigma and sword quarrels disputes arguments strife abuse lying and other evil unskilled states these monks are the 9 conditions that have their root in craving that's the end of the suta
commentary: so here the buddha is saying that because of craving we seek and seeking brings about acquisition acquisition brings about decision-making decision-making brings about lustful desire lustful desire brings about attachment attachment brings about appropriation appropriation brings about guarding and from guarding those things that we desire and then we take up the stick and the sword and we quarrel and we lie and we fight them etc the next full time is
